work_description: The Picatrix discusses the 28 Mansions of the Moon primarily in two sections: Book IV, Chapter 5 (main descriptions with degrees, properties, and operations) and Book IV, Chapter 9 (the 28 Mansions according to Pliny with detailed image prescriptions). The text notes that works should be performed when the Moon is in a mansion appropriate to the undertaking.

general_principles.good_works: The Moon must be well dignified, safe from Saturn and Mars and from the combustion of the Sun, joined to fortunes (Jupiter and Venus) by trine or sextile, separating from one fortune and applying to another.
general_principles.evil_works: The Moon should be combust or conjunct Saturn and Mars, or applying to aspect with one of these.
general_principles.via_combusta: Between the 8th degree of Libra and the 3rd degree of Scorpio (some sources say 15° Libra to 5° Scorpio)
avoid: Moon moving less than 12° per day (assimilated to Saturn)
Moon at end of sign (terms of infortunes)
general_principles.remedy: If unavoidable, place Jupiter and Venus on ascendant or midheaven to rectify an unfortunate Moon
general_principles.timing: For day works, Moon ascending in diurnal signs; for night works, Moon ascending in nocturnal signs. Signs of short ascension (Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces, Aries, Taurus, Gemini) produce swifter effects.

mansions.planetary_ruler: Mars/Aries (by sign); traditionally ruled by Mars in lunar mansion cycles
recommended_works: Travel safely and return in good health
Root for any image involving journeying
Place discord and enmity between husband and wife
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly forbidden; however evil works (discord, enmity) are done when Moon is combust or with Saturn/Mars

pliny_image.description: Image of a black man with his hair wrapped and encircled, standing on his feet, having in his right hand a spear in the manner of a warrior
pliny_image.incantation: You, Geriz, kill N son of N, or N wife of N, quickly and speedily and destroy them

mansions.notes: The wise of India begin journeys and take medicines when the Moon is in this Mansion.

mansions.planetary_ruler: Venus/Taurus (approaching); traditionally Mercury in some systems
recommended_works: Destroy buildings before they are completed
Strengthen and firm the incarceration of captives

pliny_image.description: Form of a crowned king made from white wax and mastic
pliny_image.incantation: You, Enedil, drive away this anger from me, and let me be reconciled with him, and let my petition be satisfactory to him

mansions.notes: Associated with water-finding and treasure hunting.

mansions.meaning: The Pleiades / The Many Little Ones
recommended_works: Sail safely on the sea and return safely
Cause love between man and wife

pliny_image.description: Figure of a seated woman with her right hand over her head, wrapped in cloth
pliny_image.suffumigation: Musk, camphor, mastic, and aromatic oils
pliny_image.incantation: You, Annuncia, make it so

mansions.notes: Corresponds to the Pleiades star cluster. Safe voyages and alchemy.

recommended_works: Destroy any building you wish not to endure
Make a lord despise his servant
Place discord between man and wife
Destroy fountains, streams, and underground treasure-seekers
Kill and bind all reptiles and venomous animals
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Knight riding on a horse, holding a serpent in his right hand
pliny_image.incantation: You, Assarez, make it so and fulfill my request

mansions.notes: A primarily destructive mansion; used for demolition, discord, and destroying enemies.

recommended_works: Youths to learn arts and occupations
Salvation of travelers and quick return
Favor between husband and wife (when Moon is in humane sign, safe from Saturn, Mars, and solar combustion)

pliny_image.description: Fashion from silver a head without a body, above the head write the name of the lord of this mansion and your petition
pliny_image.incantation: You, Cabil, do such and such for me and let my petition be granted
pliny_image.purpose: Receiving good from kings and high officials

mansions.notes: The text gives 'Cabil' as the spirit name for this mansion in Chapter 9, but also shows 'Assarez' as lord in some MSS. Good for education and learning. Works should be done when Moon is rising in a humane sign (Gemini, Virgo, Libra, Sagittarius, Aquarius).

recommended_works: Destroy medicines so they do not work when taken

pliny_image.description: Two images from white wax embracing each other, wrapped in white silk
pliny_image.incantation: You, Nedeyrahe, bring together so and so and so and so, and place between them friendship and love

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - can be used for both destruction and friendship.

recommended_works: Cause friendship between friends and allies
Expel flies from wherever you wish
Go into presence of king or high nobles
Cause kings and lords to be benevolent

pliny_image.description: Seal of silver with image of a man clothed in robes, hands extended to heaven in prayer/supplication; name of lord written in breast of image
pliny_image.incantation: You, Siely, cause such and such to happen, and grant my petition

mansions.notes: A fortunate mansion for commerce, travel, and gaining favor.

recommended_works: Safe travel of those who travel in wagons through countryside
Expel mice and bugs from whatever place you wish

pliny_image.description: Image of an eagle with the face of a man; name of lord inscribed on breast
pliny_image.incantation: You, Annediex, do such and such for and grant my petition

mansions.notes: A fortunate mansion for love, friendship, and victory.

recommended_works: Cause division and hatred between allies
Help a man defend himself from attack
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Lead image of a eunuch holding his hands over his eyes; name of lord inscribed on neck
pliny_image.incantation: You, Raubel, make N son of N die of sickness or N son of N's blood to flow

mansions.notes: A malefic mansion used for causing harm and destruction.

recommended_works: Make firm the incarceration of captives
Love of allies and mutual help

pliny_image.description: Head of a lion in gold or brass; name of lord written above it
pliny_image.incantation: You, Aredafir, lift up sadness, slowness and infirmity from my heart and body
pliny_image.purpose: Cure of infirmities and making childbirth easy

mansions.notes: Fortunate for love, healing, and construction.

mansions.meaning: The Mane / Tuft of Hair (of the Lion)
recommended_works: Organize trade and profit from it
Travelers on roads to journey safe and unharmed
Strengthen buildings so that they are stable

pliny_image.description: Image of a man riding a lion, holding a lance in right hand and holding the ear of the lion with left hand; name of lord written in front
pliny_image.incantation: You, Necol, bring glory to me that I shall be feared by men, and so that their fear shall cause them to tremble when they behold me; and quiet the heart of the king and of lords and of men of high estate that they may grant me honors and dignities
pliny_image.purpose: Being feared and receiving good things

mansions.notes: Fortunate for commerce, military matters, and gaining power.

recommended_works: Improve allies, officials, captives and servants to be steadfast and honest

pliny_image.description: Image of a dragon fighting with a man; name of lord written in front
pliny_image.suffumigation: Hair of a lion mixed with asafoetida
pliny_image.incantation: You, Abdizu, break apart and separate such a one from such a one

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for agriculture and improvement, but can be used for separation.

recommended_works: Travelers to have good journeys on roads
Binding of nobles to have good from them

pliny_image.description: Image of an erect man (with erect penis) from red wax, and image of a woman from white wax, bound face to face, wrapped in white silk washed in rosewater
pliny_image.incantation: Name of the one you desire written on image
pliny_image.purpose: Liberation of men unable to come to women; putting love between men and women

mansions.notes: Fortunate for commerce, agriculture, and love matters.

recommended_works: Heal the sick with physic and medicine
Destroy those who go by roads
Benefit of kings to have good and ascend to reign
Sailors to sail well and safely

pliny_image.description: Image of a dog with his own tail held in his mouth
pliny_image.suffumigation: Hair of a dog and hair of a cat
pliny_image.incantation: You, Erdegel, break apart and divide such a one from such a woman through enmity and ill will

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for healing and love, but can be used for separation and destruction.

recommended_works: Impede travelers so they cannot go on journeys
Separate husband and wife so they never join
Place discord between friends and allies
Destroy the house of your enemies

pliny_image.description: Figure of a seated man holding scrolls as if reading them
pliny_image.incantation: You, Achalich, do such and such for me, and accomplish my petition
pliny_image.purpose: Acquisition of friendship and good will

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for finding treasure and friendship, but also used for separation and discord.

recommended_works: Put discord between man and wife
Impede those who journey so end of road is never reached
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Figure of a man seated on a throne carrying a scale in his hands
pliny_image.incantation: You, Azeruch, make such and such happen for me, and accomplish my request

mansions.notes: Primarily malefic - used for destruction, discord, and impeding.

recommended_works: Improve deception that it is accomplished well
Make buildings more firm and stable
Create durable friendship with a friend
All images for lasting love ought to be made in this mansion

pliny_image.description: Figure of a monkey in an iron seal, holding his hands above his shoulders, wrapped in monkey skin
pliny_image.suffumigation: Hair of a monkey and hair of a female mouse
pliny_image.incantation: You, Adrieb, guard all my things and everything that exists within this house, nor let it be entered by thieves

mansions.notes: Particularly good for creating lasting love and durable friendship. Also used for protection of property.

recommended_works: Build buildings that will be strong
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Image of an adder holding its tail above its head
pliny_image.incantation: You, Egribel, guard this house of mine that no serpent may enter nor any other hurtful beast
pliny_image.purpose: Taking away fevers and infirmities of the belly

mansions.notes: Malefic for conspiracy and vengeance, but can be used for healing fevers and protecting property.

mansions.meaning: The Sting / Raised Tail (of the Scorpion)
recommended_works: Besiege cities and villages and enter/take them
Destroy wealth of whomever you please
Expel men from a particular place
Improve lot of men traveling by wagons through countryside
Separate and destroy riches of allies
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Seal of bronze (hene) with image of a woman holding her hands before her face
pliny_image.incantation: You, Annucel, cause the blood to flow from such and such a woman
pliny_image.purpose: Bringing on menses in women; also for quick childbirth

mansions.notes: Primarily malefic - used for siege, destruction, and violence.

picatrix_citation.footnote_reference: Book III, Chapter 10 (footnote 296: 'The Arabic text specifies that the Moon should be in her 20th Mansion, which is between 4° 17' and 17° 8' of Sagittarius')

recommended_works: Bring those traveling in wagons swiftly back
Bring evil and destruction to riches of allies

pliny_image.description: Figure having head and arms of a man, body of a horse with four feet and a tail, holding a bow (centaur with bow)
pliny_image.incantation: You, Queyhuc, cause me to take all I hunt in the world, and let them come to me swiftly

mansions.notes: Referenced in Book III, Chapter 10 for a Jupiter invocation ritual. Mixed nature - good for taming and gathering, but can be used for incarceration.

mansions.meaning: The City / The District / The Void
recommended_works: Make profit and firmly keep money
Separate wives from their proper husbands

pliny_image.description: Image of a man having two faces, one facing forward and one facing behind
pliny_image.incantation: You, Bectue, depopulate such and such a place and destroy it

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for building and wealth, but can be used for destruction.

pliny_image.description: Iron ring with figure of a man with winged feet wearing a helmet; also inscribed in iron for safety of fugitives
pliny_image.incantation: You, Geliel, bind these tongues so they cannot say bad things and make me secure and let N. escape safely from his enemies
pliny_image.purpose: Binding tongues so they do not say bad about you; safety of fugitives

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for healing and protection, but can be used for discord and binding.

picatrix_citation.footnote_reference: Book III, Chapter 10 (footnote 303: 'This is Sa'ad al Bulah, 12° 51' to 25° 42' Capricorn')

recommended_works: Captives to escape and flee from prisons

pliny_image.description: Seal of iron with image of a cat having a dog's head
pliny_image.incantation: You, Zequebin, drive out everyone from such and such a place, and destroy and devastate it

mansions.notes: Referenced in Book III, Chapter 10 for a Mars invocation ritual (the exaltation of Mars is in this mansion). Mixed nature - healing and friendship, but also destruction.

recommended_works: Soldiers to report victory over enemies
Prevent an official from fulfilling his duties

pliny_image.description: Figure of a woman with her son in her arms, nursing (in horn of castrated ram)
pliny_image.material: Horn of castrated ram (or bull for cattle)
pliny_image.incantation: You, Abrine, improve and guard this herd

mansions.notes: Fortunate for commerce and victory. The image is hung around the neck of a lead animal.

recommended_works: Take enemies captive and do evil to them
Make messengers convey messages and quickly return
Bind man and wife so they cannot copulate
Bind whichever part of the human body you wish so it cannot function
mansions.forbidden_works: None explicitly listed (this is a malefic mansion)

pliny_image.description: Seal in fig wood with figure of a man planting trees
pliny_image.incantation: You, Aziel, guard my crops and my orchards that any destruction or ill fortune may not befall them
pliny_image.purpose: Protection of orchards and crops from evil accidents

mansions.notes: Primarily malefic - used for siege, binding, and destruction. But the image can also be used for protection of crops.

mansions.meaning: The Former/First Division / The First Tear-drop
recommended_works: Protect those who travel in wagons

pliny_image.description: Image of a woman with her hair unbound, before her a vessel placed as if to receive her hair
pliny_image.incantation: You, Tagriel, bring me to the love and friendship of such and such a woman

mansions.notes: Fortunate for love, protection, and building. The 'Former' (Al-Muqaddam) as opposed to the 'Latter' (Al-Mu'akhkhar).

mansions.meaning: The Latter Division / The Last Tear-drop
recommended_works: Destroy riches of whomever you wish
Put travelers on sea in peril
Do evil to whomever you wish

pliny_image.description: Image of a winged man holding a perforated dish in his hands, raising it to his mouth; made from red earth fired hard
pliny_image.incantation: You, Abliemel, destroy such and such a spring of such and such a man

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for commerce, healing, and unity, but can be used for destruction.

mansions.meaning: The Head (of the Fish) / The Fish's House
recommended_works: Get rid of things and destroy an area
Travel safely by wagon and safely return
Cause peace and concord between man and wife
Inflict evil on sailors on the sea

pliny_image.description: Seal of bronze (hene) with image of a fish having a colored spine; name of lord written on spine
pliny_image.incantation: Name of lord written on image
pliny_image.purpose: Bringing fish together in one place

mansions.notes: Mixed nature - good for commerce, travel, and peace, but can be used for destruction and imprisonment.

book_iii_chapter_10.description: References specific mansions for planetary invocations

references.name: Nahaym
references.context: Jupiter invocation ritual - Moon should be in her 20th Mansion (4° 17' to 17° 8' Sagittarius)

references.name: Caaddebolach
references.context: Mars invocation ritual - Moon in her 23rd Mansion, in which is the exaltation of Mars (12° 51' to 25° 42' Capricorn)

book_iii_chapter_4.description: Page header appears after mansion 17, indicating the mansions 18-28 section may originate from Book III, Chapter 4 in the original Arabic manuscript structure

notes: The Picatrix describes 28 mansions (not 27). The 27 count used in some traditions omits one mansion or combines two. The Picatrix follows the Indian system of 28 mansions. The planetary rulers listed are inferred from the zodiac signs the mansions occupy and traditional attribution systems, as the Picatrix text itself does not explicitly assign planetary rulers to each mansion in the main description. The 'lord of mansion' spirits are from Book IV, Chapter 9 (the Pliny section). The degrees given are precise to minutes and seconds as stated in the text.
